item.title: What It Takes to Move Heavy Steel
item.description: A look at what it takes to get steel this heavy on the road, with garage and repair work behind the move. What steps are involved here?

media:content.media:title: What It Takes to Move Heavy Steel
media:content.media:description: A look at what it takes to get steel this heavy on the road, with garage and repair work behind the move. What steps are involved here?

item.title: This Abandoned Boom Lift Wouldn’t Budge
item.description: An abandoned boom lift puts up a fight before the repair work finally gets it moving again. A hands-on garage fix with a clear before-and-after result. What changed to make it give up?

media:content.media:title: This Abandoned Boom Lift Wouldn’t Budge
media:content.media:description: An abandoned boom lift puts up a fight before the repair work finally gets it moving again. A hands-on garage fix with a clear before-and-after result. What changed to make it give up?

item.title: Will It Start? CAT 3406b Kenworth Cabover Hasn't Ran in 25 Years!
item.description: A forgotten rig gets its second chance in the shop, with the Kenworth brought back after 25 years asleep. A straightforward restoration and mechanical revival—what would you inspect first?

media:content.media:title: Will It Start? CAT 3406b Kenworth Cabover Hasn't Ran in 25 Years!
media:content.media:description: A forgotten rig gets its second chance in the shop, with the Kenworth brought back after 25 years asleep. A straightforward restoration and mechanical revival—what would you inspect first?

item.title: Big Diesel, Dead Quiet Then This
item.description: A big diesel build stays quiet until it wakes up. If it wakes up, you’ll know it immediately. What changes are coming next?

media:content.media:title: Big Diesel, Dead Quiet Then This
media:content.media:description: A big diesel build stays quiet until it wakes up. If it wakes up, you’ll know it immediately. What changes are coming next?

item.title: We Spent a Week Waking This Engine Up
item.description: Grime, guesswork, and one satisfying comeback from the shop floor. A hands-on repair and garage project focused on mechanical work and getting the engine back to life. What would you tackle next?

media:content.media:title: We Spent a Week Waking This Engine Up
media:content.media:description: Grime, guesswork, and one satisfying comeback from the shop floor. A hands-on repair and garage project focused on mechanical work and getting the engine back to life. What would you tackle next?
